boundary_binding.action_boundary: AP may execute only if current source records close the exact vendor-rail match for this action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Not allowed; the required vendor entity match remains unresolved
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Current control records show the rail-owner dependency is missing, stale, or mismatched
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Source records do not close the dependency before execution; authority remains open

final_answer: Do not proceed. The source record set does not close the exact action boundary because the vendor entity-to-rail-owner match remains unresolved. Policy requires current source-control closure before any payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action. Escalate to repair the dependency; prior history, urgency, or parent-vendor relationship is not sufficient authority.
open_blockers: vendor entity must match rail owner
